title: Morning Reflections: Devotional Writing for Radio
body: A guide to shaping a 2-hour Saturday morning devotional broadcast. Covers segment structure, listener prayer requests, scripture reading pacing, and transitioning between music and spoken word. Drawn from six years of live production experience at WGSP 1490 AM.

title: Chaplaincy Pastoral Documentation Best Practices
body: How to log chaplaincy visits, spiritual assessments, and interdisciplinary team notes in a way that honors patient dignity and meets APC documentation standards. Covers HIPAA-compliant language and what never to include in shared systems.

title: CPE Continuing Education Hour Tracking
body: Board Certified Chaplains must complete 50 CPE hours per calendar year. This document outlines how to log workshops, peer consultation, reading groups, and conference attendance toward the December 31 deadline. Current year: 28 of 50 hours completed.

title: Weekly Radio Segment Planning Workflow
body: Wednesday evening: confirm guest booking and segment topics. Thursday evening: script writing and music playlist. Friday: finalize scripture readings and sponsor spots. Saturday 5:30 AM: arrive studio, soundcheck, live broadcast 7-9 AM on WGSP 1490 AM.

title: Managing Radio Sponsorships
body: Morning Reflections with Rebecca carries three recurring sponsors: Covenant Insurance Group, Mitchell's Flowers, and Bluff City Auto Care. Monthly invoice review on the 1st. Sponsors receive 30-second live reads per hour, plus a mention in the weekly show recap post.

title: Morning Reflections Blog - Publish Workflow
body: Each Saturday broadcast generates a companion blog post: episode recap, scripture reference, key reflection question, and a prayer. Posts are drafted in Google Docs and published to the Morning Reflections site by Sunday evening. Tags: devotional, scripture, weekly-reflection.

title: Annual Church Health Fair Planning Guide
body: Grace Community Church hosts a community health fair in coordination with Deacon Charles Mosley and Bluff City Community College nursing faculty. Topics include blood pressure screening, diabetes awareness, mental health first aid, and advance directive education.

title: Bluff City Medical Center Pastoral Care Team Overview
body: The Pastoral Care department includes four staff chaplains and two CPE residents. Rebecca Price serves as chaplain covering oncology, ICU, and palliative care, with rotating overnight on-call. Supervisor: Dr. Lorraine Vickers, Director of Pastoral Care.

title: Sermon Illustration Index: Grief, Hope, and Healing
body: A curated index of sermon illustrations appropriate for hospital chapel services, radio reflection segments, and congregational meditations. Sources include Howard Thurman, Henri Nouwen, Brené Brown, and original pastoral encounters (all patient details anonymized).

title: New Year Dawn Service - Meditation Script Guide
body: Rebecca delivers the dawn meditation each New Year at Grace Community Church, a service of new beginnings and light in the darkness. This document outlines timing (5:45 AM start), scripture selection, musical transitions with the worship team, and the closing benediction. Estimated speaking time: 12 minutes.

title: WGSP Guest Booking - Pre-Interview Template
body: Template for pre-interview guest briefings on Morning Reflections with Rebecca. Includes: guest bio, scripture or theme connection, 3 prepared questions, technical setup notes, and WGSP 1490 AM appearance release form. Send to TJ Jackson for station records.

title: Canva Graphics: Morning Reflections Show Art
body: Standard dimensions and brand guidelines for Morning Reflections social media graphics. Instagram posts: 1080x1080. Story: 1080x1920. Show logo: warm cream background, serif font, sunrise motif. Export as PNG. @morningreflectionsrebecca branding on all assets.

title: Audacity Audio Editing: Podcast Clip Production
body: After each Saturday broadcast, Rebecca clips 2-3 highlight segments using Audacity for social sharing and the Morning Reflections podcast archive. Noise reduction, fade-in/out, and export at 128kbps MP3. File naming: WGSP_YYYYMMDD_segment_title.mp3

title: Frequently Asked Questions: Morning Reflections Search
body: Common questions about finding episodes, devotional transcripts, guest archives, and scripture indexes on the Morning Reflections platform. How to search by theme, date range, guest name, or scripture reference.

title: Scripture Reference Index for Devotional Search
body: Full index of scripture passages used in Morning Reflections broadcasts from 2019 to present. Searchable by book, chapter, verse, season (Advent, Lent, Pentecost, Ordinary Time), and thematic tag (grief, hope, healing, justice, joy, perseverance).
